summary: The diff addresses REQ-1 by making frontend-side fixes: guarding against submitting before the authenticated actor is ready (checking isFetching and actor availability), adding actor initialization checks in useCreatePaste, CreatePastePage, and PasteEditModal. The backend main.mo also shows changes, though the file is truncated. The frontend correctly passes the authenticated actor and prevents uploads with a stale anonymous actor. No evidence of backend saveFile authorization logic being changed is visible in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Investigate and fix whether the backend is rejecting calls due to a misconfigured principal check in the file upload authorization guard (saveFile function)
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the saveFile or file upload authorization guard. There is no visible evidence that the backend authorization check for file uploads (the one producing 'Unauthorized: Only logged-in users can upload files') was modified or removed. Only frontend guards were clearly implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: Paste verification step after creation: after calling createPaste, the frontend calls getPaste to verify the paste was stored correctly
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks to fix the unauthorized upload error. Adding a post-creation verification call (getPaste after createPaste) was not requested.
